heading: Program authorized
label: 6392 Program authorized
text: In order to carry out the purpose of this part, the Secretary shall make grants to State educational agencies, or combinations of such agencies, to establish or improve, directly or through local operating agencies, programs of education for migratory children in accordance with this part.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6392, , as added , , , authorized migratory children education program, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by .Pub. L. 89–10, title I, § 1302Pub. L. 103–382, title I, § 101108 Stat. 3585Pub. L. 107–110Oct. 20, 1994
